title: AIventure: Vibe Coding Journey
summary: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler built with Angular and Phaser.js that teaches developers vibe coding and agentic behaviors through interactive gameplay. It uses Gemma 4 to power NPCs that generate code and handle autonomous reasoning with tool calls, with flexible model serving options including local inference and cloud APIs.
writeup: This video presents AIventure, an open source retro dungeon crawler built on Angular and Phaser.js and powered by Gemma 4, designed to teach prompt engineering and agentic behaviors through gameplay. It matters as a concrete reference for builders weighing how to wire a model into an interactive app across different serving paths. The key takeaways: the game runs local inference via Transformers.js, Ollama, and LM Studio, and routes to the cloud through the Gemini API and Google Cloud, illustrating tradeoffs between local and hosted model serving.
